title: Emma's Day
text:
Emma is a teacher. She lives in a small house near her school. She wakes up at 7:00 every morning. She drinks coffee and eats bread and cheese for breakfast. Then she walks to school.

She starts work at 8:30. She teaches English to young students. She likes her job because she loves children. She finishes work at 3:00 in the afternoon. After school, she goes home and rests for one hour.

In the evening, she cooks dinner. She usually eats vegetables and rice. After dinner, she watches TV or reads a book. She sometimes calls her friends.

Emma goes to bed at 10:30. She sleeps early because she wakes up early every day. On weekends, she visits her family or goes to the park. She likes her simple life.

questions.question: What time does Emma wake up?
How does Emma go to school?
What does Emma do after school?
What does Emma do in the evening?
Emma goes to bed late every night.
